Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests

Class AutoFormulaRewriterL2Tests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AbstractFormulaRewriterTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.PredicateSimplifierTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterL0Tests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterL1Tests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterL2Tests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AutoFormulaRewriterL3Tests
public class AutoFormulaRewriterL2Tests extends AutoFormulaRewriterL1Tests
This is the class for testing automatic rewriter L2 AutoRewriterImpl using the abstract auto formula rewriter tests AbstractAutoFormulaRewriterTests.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.PredicateSimplifierTests

    PredicateSimplifierTests.FullTests, PredicateSimplifierTests.MinimalTests

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkOptions()
    Ensures that the predicate simplifier is correctly parameterized.
    void
    testSIMP_BCOMP_ID()
    Ensures that rule SIMP_BCOMP_ID is implemented correctly
    void
    testSIMP_CARD_COMPSET()
    Ensures that superseded rule SIMP_CARD_COMPSET is implemented correctly, although indirectly by rule SIMP_COMPSET_IN.

    • checkOptions

      public void checkOptions()
